message:
refactor(wasm): unify WASM and native entry points with comptime

WASM now uses native_main_static.zig with comptime conditionals instead
of separate wasm_main_static.zig. This ensures both targets share the
same code paths, with platform-specific features disabled for wasm32.

Changes:
- native_main_static.zig: Add is_wasm32 comptime checks for polyfills
- build.zig: WASM target now uses native_main_static.zig
- wasm_main_static.zig: Remove WAMR mentions (AOT-only file)

Native binary unchanged - comptime conditionals evaluate to false.
WASM via wasmtime: fib(40) now 460ms (was 67000ms with old AOT path).
